title: Worst leaves
description: The worst leaves texture pack made unintentional
body:
# Worst Leaves

**Worst Leaves** is a simple texture pack that makes Minecraft’s leaves look strange, messy, or visually unstable. The effect is unintentional — the pack is not designed to look chaotic on purpose, it just ended up that way. Use it if you want your world to feel a bit odd or offbeat.

---

## ⚠️ Epilepsy Warning

Textures may show **strong contrast or unstable patterns** that could affect players with **photosensitive epilepsy**. Please use with caution.
